passive.name: Shepherd of Souls
passive.description: The Cursed Horde: Yorick can summon Mist Walkers to swarm and attack nearby enemies.

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Innate- Final Service:}} Enemies that die near {{ci|Yorick}} will leave a ''grave'', as well as those he kills with ''{{ai|Last Rites|Yorick}}''. '''Yorick''' can use ''{{ai|Awakening|Yorick}}'' and ''{{ai|Mourning Mist|Yorick}}'' to turn all ''graves'' into {{as|Mist Walkers|mist}} that assist him in combat.
wiki_detail.blurb2: {{sbc|Innate - The Cursed Horde:}} {{as|Mist Walkers|mist}} will autonomously advance a lane upon entering combat within. '''Yorick''' can have up to 4 {{as|Mist Walkers|mist}}.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Innate - Final Service:}} '''Yorick''' raises a ''grave'' for every enemy he kills with ''{{ai|Last Rites|Yorick}}'', as well as for every enemy {{tip|champion}} and large {{tip|monster}} that dies near him. Additionally, '''Yorick''' raises a grave for every {{pp|12th;6th;2nd|1;7;13}} enemy that dies otherwise near him. Up to 4 ''graves'' can exist at once, with the furthest ones being replaced by the newest.
wiki_detail.description2: '''Yorick''' can use ''{{ai|Awakening|Yorick}}'' and ''{{ais|Mourning Mist|Yorick}}'' mark to raise a {{as|Mist Walker|mist}} from each ''grave''.
wiki_detail.description3: {{sbc|Innate - The Cursed Horde:}} Up to 4 {{as|Mist Walkers|mist}} can be active at once near Yorick or near Maiden of The Mist, with the closest ones being replaced by the newest.
wiki_detail.effect radius: {{tt|1000|Grave summon range}} / {{tt|2500|Grave despawn range, pending for test}}

Q.name: Last Rites
Q.description: Yorick deals bonus damage on his next attack and heals himself. If the target is a champion or large monster or if the target dies, a grave will be dug.
Q.tooltip:
Yorick's next Attack deals an additional {{ bonusdamage }} physical damage and restores {{ qheal }} plus {{ missinghealthratio }}% of his missing Health, reduced by {{ healreduction }}% against non-Champions. If this Attack hits a Champion or large Monster or kills the target, it leaves a grave.

When there are 3 or more graves nearby and this Ability has already been used, Yorick can Recast to raise Mist Walkers from all nearby graves.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{cis|Yorick}} next basic attack within a few seconds will gain {{sti|range|'''bonus''' range}}, deal {{as|'''bonus''' physical damage}}, and {{tip|heal}} him. The heal is increased while {{as|below half health}}.
wiki_detail.blurb2: If there are at least 3 ''graves'' nearby while ''Last Rites'' is active or on {{sti|cooldown}}, he can cast ''Awakening''.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Yorick''' empowers his next [[basic attack]] within 5 seconds to have an {{tip|uncancellable windup}}, gain {{sti|range|50 '''bonus''' range}}, deal {{as|'''bonus''' physical damage}}, and {{tip|heal}} him. The heal is reduced by 50% against non-champions.
wiki_detail.leveling:
{{st|Bonus Physical Damage|{{ap|30 to 130}} {{as|(+ 40% AD)}}}}
{{st|Heal|{{pp|10 to 20 for 6;23 to 38 for 6;43 to 68|formula = 10 + 2 per level until 6, then + 3 per level until 12, then + 5 per level}} {{as|(+ {{ap|4 to 8}}% of his '''missing''' health)}}|Non-Champion Heal|{{pp|10*0.5 to 20*0.5 for 6;23*0.5 to 38*0.5 for 6;43*0.5 to 68*0.5|formula = 5 + 1 per level until 6, then + 1.5 per level until 12, then + 2.5 per level}} {{as|(+ {{ap|4*0.5 to 8*0.5}}% of his '''missing''' health)}}}}
wiki_detail.description2: While there are at least 3 ''graves'' nearby and ''Last Rites'' is active or on {{sti|cooldown}}, '''Yorick''' can cast ''{{ai|Awakening|Yorick}}''.
wiki_detail.description3: ''Last Rites {{tip|basic attack reset|resets}} '''Yorick's''' basic attack timer.''

W.name: Dark Procession
W.description: Yorick summons a destructible wall at target location that will block enemy movement.
W.tooltip: Yorick summons a wall of spirits blocking enemies' path, but not allies'. The wall has {{ wallhealthtooltip }} Health and disappears after {{ circleduration }} seconds.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Yorick}} summons a destructible ring of spirits at the target location that {{tip|airborne|knocks aside}} enemies hit. It remains as [[terrain]] against enemies for a few seconds,
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Yorick''' summons a ring of spirits around the target location that arises after a {{fd|0.75}}-second delay, {{tip|airborne|knocking aside}} enemies hit over {{fd|0.25}} seconds, though not through terrain. Within {{tt|210-units|Estimated}}, they are pulled inside; otherwise they are pushed away. The ring remains for 4 seconds as impassible [[terrain]] against enemies, granting {{tip|sight}} inside the ring.
wiki_detail.description2: ''Dark Procession'' can only be targeted by enemy {{tip|champion}} basic attacks and {{tip|turrets}}. The wall takes 1 [[damage]] per attack from champions and is destroyed instantly from turret attacks.
wiki_detail.effect radius: {{tt|225|Spirits spawn radius}} / {{tt|200|Sight radius from center of ring}}
wiki_detail.spelleffects:
|notes   = 
* ''Dark Procession'' has a {{tip|turret}} prioritization value of 6, equal to that of {{ui|Blue Super Minion|link = super minion|super minions}}.
** '''Yorick's''' other {{tip|pet|pets}} each have a lower prioritization value, allowing him to delay the turret from targeting the {{ai|Eulogy of the Isles|Yorick|The Maiden}} or a {{as|Mist Walker|mist}} for one attack.
* ''Dark Procession'' deals 0 {{tip|proc damage|proc}} {{tip|true damage}} to enemies it knocks aside, which triggers [[combat status|in-combat]] effects such as drawing turret and [[Monster#Monster_Behavior|monster aggression]], {{ri|Sudden Impact}} or applying {{ii|Elixir of Sorcery}}.
* The perimeter is made up of 18 units with 100 {{tip|pathing radius}} and 20 {{tip|gameplay radius}} each.
* Repeatedly while the cage persists, all enemy {{tip|champions}} inside it become marked for '''Yorick''' to gain an {{tip|takedown|assist}} on them should they perish within the standard 10 seconds assist time.

E.name: Mourning Mist
E.description: Yorick throws a globule of Black Mist that reduces armor, damages, slows and marks enemies. Summoned units gain move speed when moving towards marked targets.
E.tooltip:
Yorick throws a globule of Black Mist that deals {{ calc_healthdamage }} max Health magic damage, Slows by {{ calc_slow }} for {{ slowduration }} seconds and marks champions and monsters for {{ markduration }} seconds. Marked enemies continuously Awaken nearby graves (but not exceeding the maximum of {{ spell.yorickpassive:yorickpassiveghoulmax }}) and suffer {{ armorshred*100 }}% reduced Armor.

Yorick and his summoned units gain {{ hasteamount*100 }}% Move Speed toward the mark. Mist Walkers will leap once at marked enemies that get away from them.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Yorick}} hurls a globule of Black Mist that splashes at the target location, dealing {{as|magic damage}} to enemies hit by a portion of {{as|their '''current''' health}}. Enemy {{tip|champions}} and {{tip|monsters}} hit are also shortly {{tip|slow|slowed}}, and marked ''Cursed'' for a few seconds.
wiki_detail.blurb2: '''Yorick''' and his summons gain {{sti|ms|{{as|'''bonus''' movement speed}}}} toward a ''Cursed'' target. {{as|Mist Walkers|mist}} will leap to a nearby ''Cursed'' target and focus them.
wiki_detail.blurb4: {{sbc|Cursed:}} The target takes increased damage from {{as|Mist Walkers|mist}}. Nearby ''graves'' automatically raise a {{as|Mist Walkers|mist}}.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Yorick''' hurls a globule of Black Mist that splashes across an area at the target location, dealing {{as|magic damage}} to enemies hit equal to {{as|15% of the target's '''current''' health}}, down to a minimum threshold.
wiki_detail.description2: Enemy {{tip|champions}} and {{tip|monsters}} hit are {{tip|slow|slowed}} by 30% for 2 seconds, and marked as ''Cursed'' for 4 seconds. ''Cursed'' champions are also {{tip|standard sight|revealed}}.
wiki_detail.description3:
{{sbc|Cursed:}} The target takes 20% '''bonus''' damage from 8 attacks by {{as|Mist Walkers|mist}} and continually raises a {{as|Mist Walker|mist}} from each nearby ''grave'', up to a maximum of 4.

'''Yorick''', {{as|Mist Walkers|mist}} and the '''{{ui|Maiden of the Mist|The Maiden|nolink=true}}''' gain {{sti|ms|{{as|20% '''bonus''' movement speed}}}} while facing nearby ''Cursed'' enemies. {{as|Mist Walkers|mist}} will {{tip|dash|leap}} to nearby ''Cursed'' enemy champions and large monsters, dealing {{ccs|{{as|100% of their AD}}|physical}} upon arrival.
wiki_detail.description4: ''Mourning Mist will cast at max range if cast beyond that.''
wiki_detail.notes:
* '''Yorick''' will snap his facing direction towards the target location at the start of the cast time.
* The speed boost toward marked targetes does not require {{tip|sight}} of them.
* The {{as|Mist Walkers|mist}} do not {{tip|dash|leap}} if they are {{tip|immobilize|immobilized}} or {{tip|ground|grounded}}, or if the ''marked'' target is {{tip|untargetable}}.

R.name: Eulogy of the Isles
R.description: Yorick summons the Maiden of the Mist that causes Yorick's attacks against the Maiden's target to deal bonus damage. The Maiden will also automatically raise Walkers from dead enemies.
R.tooltip:
Yorick summons the Maiden of the Mist with {{ yorickbigghoulhealth }} Health and {{ yorickbigghouldamage }} Magic Attack Damage plus {{ rghoulnumbers }} Mist Walkers. The Maiden automatically raises Mist Walkers from nearby enemy deaths and marks enemy Champions with her attacks. When Yorick damages the Maiden's target, he deals {{ rmarkdamagepercent }}% max Health magic damage.

After 10 seconds, Yorick can Recast this Ability to free the Maiden, sending her down the nearest lane.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Yorick}} summons the '''{{ui|Maiden of the Mist|nolink=true}}''' and a few {{as|Mist Walkers|mist}} at the target location. The ''Maiden'' will automatically raise {{as|Mist Walkers|mist}} from dead enemies, and mark her attack target with ''Touch of the Maiden''.
wiki_detail.blurb2: ''Eulogy of the Isles'' can be recast while the ''Maiden'' is active.
wiki_detail.blurb3: {{sbc|Recast:}} '''Yorick''' sets the ''Maiden'' free, allowing her to push the nearest lane.
wiki_detail.blurb4: {{sbc|Touch of the Maiden:}} '''Yorick's''' next basic attack will consume the mark to deal {{as|'''bonus''' magic damage}} by a portion of the {{as|target's '''maximum''' health}}.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Yorick''' summons the '''{{ui|Maiden of the Mist|nolink=true}}''' surrounded by a number of {{as|Mist Walkers|mist}} at the target location, which remain on the battlefield until she or '''Yorick''' dies. ''Eulogy of the Isles'' can be recast once while the ''Maiden'' is alive after 10 seconds of the activation.
wiki_detail.description2: {{sbc|Recast:}} '''Yorick''' sets the ''Maiden'' free, allowing her to push the nearest [[lanes|lane]] until she dies.
wiki_detail.description3: ''See [[Yorick/LoL#Pets|Pets]] for more details about The '''{{ui|Maiden of the Mist|nolink=true}}'''. Eulogy of the Isles will cast at max range if cast beyond that.''
wiki_detail.cooldown: {{tt|{{ap|160 to 100}}|Begins after Yorick's death or the ''Maiden of the Mist's'' death}}
wiki_detail.notes:
* See the ''Pets'' section below for more details about ''The Maiden of the Mist'' and {{as|Mist Walkers|mist}}.
* The extra {{as|Mist Walkers|mist}} spawn 250 units from the ''Maiden'' summon location.
* The ''Maiden'' updates her stats when '''Yorick's''' [[champion statistic|stats]] change, and as ''Eulogy of the Isles'' is ranked up.
* When '''Yorick''' dies, ''The Maiden'' rapidly loses portions of her {{as|'''maximum''' health}} over 3 seconds until she dies.
** The loss of {{as|'''maximum''' health}} occurs in {{fd|0.6}}-second intervals, in which she loses 20% on the first, 25% on the second, {{fd|33.{{recurring|3}}%}} on the third, 50% on the fourth, and 100% on the fifth.
* '''Yorick''' will snap his facing direction towards the target location at the start of the cast time.
wiki_detail.flavorsound:
{{sm2|Yorick_Original_R_1.ogg}} ''"Behold the horrors of the Isles!"''
{{sm2|Yorick_Original_R_Maiden_1.ogg}} '''Maiden of the Mist:''' ''"The mist takes all!"''
